Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From The Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SVETLANA M. SHIRINOVA, Tel No. 415-947-0703 appearing for the Plaintiffs;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ASHLEY DANIELLE GERMANO AND STEVEN GERMANO' Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From The Complaint is denied as untimely. See CCP 435(b)(1); City and County of San Francisco v. Strahlendorf (1992) 7 Cal.App.4th 1911, 1913. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From The Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Continued To Sep-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS ASHLEY DANIELLE GERMANO AND STEVEN GERMANO'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From The Complaint is continued to September 18, 2015, to give the Opposing party an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 18, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg
